pos_sentences.text: Course teaches many rhings related opening our own brand
pos_sentences.name: Bhasker

pos_sentences.text: I liked the faculty, infrastructure, subjects, way of teaching, amazing canteen and auditorium
pos_sentences.name: Bulbul Bhartiya

pos_sentences.text: The mess and the canteen provide us good and tasty food. The labs and classrooms are top-notch.
pos_sentences.name: Pariza Bhalla

pos_sentences.text: The hostels are situated within the campus which benefits the students as they can connect with the other students.
pos_sentences.name: Pariza Bhalla

pos_sentences.text: The curriculum is wholly practical based which gives the best knowledge.
pos_sentences.name: Tanmay

pos_sentences.text: A lot of social activities are done which are really good for the personal growth of the students.
pos_sentences.name: Tanmay

pos_sentences.text: The college campus is really neat and clean.
pos_sentences.name: Tanmay

pos_sentences.text: I also really like how the Institute establishes grounds for a secure professional life for you. Almost all my seniors are doing extremely well for themselves, career wise, and so I think NIFT really does set you up for your professional life.
pos_sentences.name: Rating Sage

pos_sentences.text: NIFT makes a conscious effort to always promote traditional handicrafts, handlooms, artisans and fashion sustainability, which I think is wonderful!
pos_sentences.name: Rating Sage

pos_sentences.text: The atmosphere inside NIFT is very open and accepting in many fields that are considered a "taboo" in our society, like sexuality, gender identity and other aspects of Individuality, which I think is absolutely Amazing!
pos_sentences.name: Rating Sage

neg_sentences.text: Temperature and heat of jodhpur is very bad
neg_sentences.name: Bhasker

neg_sentences.text: There scholarship system was really bad they don't even inform that the firm's are online
neg_sentences.name: Bulbul Bhartiya

neg_sentences.text: The campus happens to be 25 kilometers from the Jodhpur city so the campus to city travel is that of 40 - 45 minutes.
neg_sentences.name: Pariza Bhalla

neg_sentences.text: There is no air conditioners, common room and microwave in boys hostels yet. They are provided with coolers instead.
neg_sentences.name: Tanmay

neg_sentences.text: There are a lot of assignments which helps but also feels hectic for the students.
neg_sentences.name: Tanmay

neg_sentences.text: If you get selected by one company in placements you are not allowed to sit for another brand.
neg_sentences.name: Tanmay

neg_sentences.text: The girl to boy ratio is honestly bad, at least in Jodhpur campus, at approximately 8:2, so that's another negative.
neg_sentences.name: Rating Sage

neg_sentences.text: Again, since the scoring is done on subjective presentations, scoring depends on your ability to defend your work and also, how well you get along with your faculty.
neg_sentences.name: Rating Sage

neg_sentences.text: Since majority of the examinations are practical and not theoretical, scoring is difficult. The answers are subjective, so it all depends on how well you can defend your presentation and how well the panel understands you.
neg_sentences.name: Rating Sage

neg_sentences.text: I'm not sure if this is campus specific or not, but regardless. Creativity is encouraged but also limited to the understanding of the judge. It's almost impossible to go beyond the limit set by them.
neg_sentences.name: Rating Sage
